description: Your left arm and hand have been replaced by bionic equivalents.  They no longer bleed or feel discomfort, but they cannot heal and need power to operate.
Your right arm and hand have been replaced by bionic equivalents.  They no longer bleed or feel discomfort, but they cannot heal and need power to operate.
Your left leg and foot have been replaced by bionic equivalents.  They no longer bleed or feel discomfort, but they cannot heal and need power to operate.
Your right leg and foot have been replaced by bionic equivalents.  They no longer bleed or feel discomfort, but they cannot heal and need power to operate.
